introSection: Phobia Phear Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster at Lake Compounce in Bristol, Connecticut, USA. It is a Sky Rocket II from Premier Rides.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On July 1, 2015, a wooden crate was placed inside the park. On each day, a different "fear" was revealed, teasing a new attraction. Phobia Phear Coaster was announced on July 10.

Phobia Phear Coaster completed its first full circuit in late April 2016. Phobia opened on May 7, 2016, twelve competition winners were the first members of the public to ride.

fullText:
Phobia Phear Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster at Lake Compounce in Bristol, Connecticut, USA. It is a Sky Rocket II from Premier Rides.

On July 1, 2015, a wooden crate was placed inside the park. On each day, a different "fear" was revealed, teasing a new attraction. Phobia Phear Coaster was announced on July 10.

Phobia Phear Coaster completed its first full circuit in late April 2016. Phobia opened on May 7, 2016, twelve competition winners were the first members of the public to ride.
